factors.summary: The aftermarket/service revenue is showing positive growth trends, primarily driven by recurring revenue from long-term service agreements. The installed base and active service agreements contribute to this growth, though there are some shifts in billings and profitability affecting long-term service agreements.

evidence.text: Included in our RPO at March 31, 2024 are services agreements on approximately 25,000 of our onshore wind turbines, from an installed base of approximately 56,000 units.
Long-term service agreements decreased due to billings and profitability changes, indicating active service revenue generation.
